AddressInfo.Title: ČEZ Public Charging Station(AC+DC).
AddressInfo.AccessComments: Unlimited public access,but unfinished surface in front of the charging station-no asphalt,no pavement,no concreet,just open land/gravel access.

Connections.Comments: L-N voltage mentioned(L-L voltage is 400V). KWh:8CZK for ČEZ registered users;10CZK for non-registered users;11.5CZK for E.On users.

GeneralComments: Dark place @ night,no public lamps @ location,restrooms across the street @ OMV,looks like unfinished place,the surface between the road & charging station is not fortified(no asphalt nor pavement).
